text: Welcome back! Your skills are still here — let's dust them off together!
Hey! So glad to see you again. Ready to pick up where you left off?
You're back! Every return is a fresh chance to grow. Let's do this!
Great to see you again! Your progress is waiting for you — let's continue the journey!
Welcome back! Learning is a journey with breaks, and that's perfectly okay.
You've returned — that takes commitment! Let's make this session count!
Back again! Your skills haven't gone anywhere. Let's strengthen them even more!
Hello again! Whether it's been a day or a week, you're exactly where you need to be.
Your return shows real dedication. Let's jump back in and keep building!
Welcome back! The best learners are the ones who keep coming back. You're one of them!
